rationale: Selected from Stage 1 plus isolated optional mechanism evidence: the scalable root connectivity flow directly matches the only absent legacy variable family, improves both regression-control 300-second lower bounds and the moderate control, retains all exactness/lifecycle gates, and is kept separate from unsupported eager/estimate/delta portfolios; V12_M2's 300-second regression remains an explicit Stage 2 promotion risk.
selection_scope: Stage 1 plus isolated optional mechanism evidence; no Stage 2/3 result used
